markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off strategy sprint and content collaboration between HyperExponential (HX) and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HX is expanding from UK to US market, requiring new marketing approaches and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Key personas: actuaries (current strength), underwriters (growth target), IT leaders (emerging importance)](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Main products: risk modeling platform, new AI-powered submission triage tool, portfolio-level analysis](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Content goals: establish thought leadership, increase visibility vs competitors, enable sales team](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Topics

### HX Company & Product Overview

  - [Niche success in UK insurance market with 50% market share](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Expanding to US and international markets, facing new marketing challenges](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Core product: AI-native platform for complex risk modeling and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
  - [New product: AI-powered submission triage to accelerate underwriting process](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Third offering: Portfolio-level risk analysis and repricing](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)

### Target Audience & Personas

  - [Actuaries: Current strength and primary champions](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Underwriters: Growth target, own P\&L and full workflow](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [IT/Digital Transformation leaders: Emerging importance, especially in US market](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Challenge: Balancing content for all personas across various insurance business lines](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Earnix, Federado, Sixfold, Indico](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [HX has more revenue (except vs Earnix) but less mindshare in US market](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=2826.0)
  - [Biggest "competitor" is often in-house build decisions](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Positioning: HX as accelerator for in-house builds, not just "build vs buy"](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)

### Content Strategy Needs

  - [Increase organic presence and traffic in US market](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Develop thought leadership around AI in underwriting](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Create deep, solution-specific content (e.g. competitive guides, business line versions)](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Potential media property launch (e.g. thecuo.com for Chief Underwriting Officers)](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=2735.0)
  - [Balance between high-level thought leadership and detailed product/solution content](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Current Marketing Efforts

  - [Primary lead sources: Word of mouth, outbound, industry events](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=2615.0)
  - [Existing content: \~50 blog posts, annual "State of Pricing" report](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=2696.0)
  - [New format: Roundtable discussions on AI in underwriting](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=2740.0)

### Challenges & Opportunities

  - [Limited capacity for content creation, looking to AI-native workflows](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage deep industry expertise for thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Need for programmatic approach to content across business lines](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Potential to create sales enablement materials alongside public-facing content](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to conduct product deep dive this week](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=3501.0)
  - [HX to provide access to CMS (new Framer instance) and analytics tools](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=3508.0)
  - [HX to share raw sales call transcripts and structured buyer journey docs](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=3581.0)
  - [GrowthX to build initial artifact versions, explaining improvements made](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=3535.0)
  - [Develop firm content strategy and topic clusters by next week](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=3627.0)
  - [Explore GitHub integration for sharing and collaborating on content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/CTzk9yXy7Py2jC8JpiWsaxuByFTKEbnc?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
